name: Ground Beef Grand Style
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of chicken or mushroom soup (10 1/2 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and onions, then drain excess fat.
2. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, soup, and milk.
3. Add salt, ketchup, and the browned beef to the cream cheese mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into two 2-quart casserole dishes.
5. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
6. Place biscuits on top of each dish and add sliced stuffed olives if desired.
7. Bake at 375°F for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serves 6 to 8.
